summary: Phase 20 is COMPLETE for its build-then-halt scope. All 3 plans executed; all GSD post-execution gates passed (verify 20/20, secure threats_open:0, validate nyquist_compliant:true); 22 learnings extracted and pooled to the global store. The ONLY open item is a user decision: whether to run the metered claude -p eval measurements (EVL-01/EVL-02), which are gated per D-11 / eval-run-approval-gate. Nothing metered has run.

completed_tasks.name: EVL-01 trigger-eval harness build (vendored rig + check-evals three-way boundary + trigger/reciprocal/negatives data)
EVL-02 RED-behavior grader build (grade-run.mjs D-05-RUBRIC + 10 scenarios)
Finalize: EVAL-RESULTS.md scaffold + full battery GREEN + gated command set + HALT
gsd-nyquist-auditor: nyquist_compliant true, no spurious tests
phase.complete + reverted EVL-01/EVL-02 to Pending + fixed STATE.md em-dash

remaining_tasks.name: USER DECISION: run the metered eval measurements now, or defer. Options presented: (a) Defer all (recommended - a usage limit was hit once this session; phase build is complete); (b) Run EVL-01 trigger only (~144 probes, no fan-out); (c) Run all incl. EVL-02 behavior (60 coach subagents + LLM judge + unbiased reviewer, large spend). User chose to CLARIFY the options first; no decision recorded yet.
IF approved: EVL-01 forward recall/specificity via canary-gated runners (node run-recall-chunks.mjs / run-spec-chunks.mjs)
IF approved: EVL-01 reciprocal via direct run_eval TWICE (--skill-path lz-tpp, then lz-refactor) over reciprocal-red.json

IF approved: EVL-02 orchestrator fan-out (10 scenarios x with_skill/no_skill x >=3 runs) -> grade-run -> LLM judge -> merge-judge --merge/--verify -> aggregate_benchmark -> generate_review; then fill EVAL-RESULTS.md Pass@k/Pass^k + >=1 unbiased reviewer

IF a D-08 soft bar is missed on a demonstrated defect: at-most-one bounded D-09 tuning (description widen on a held-out set OR bounded coach-wording tweak); own >=1 unbiased review; /reload-plugins is a human ship action
Phase 20 is the LAST phase of milestone lz-tdd@0.0.3. After the eval decision resolves, milestone close (/gsd-complete-milestone) is the next milestone-level action

blockers.description: The metered eval RUNS require explicit user approval before executing (D-11 HARD GATE / eval-run-approval-gate). Not a technical blocker - a mandatory human decision gate.
blockers.workaround: The exact ready-to-run commands are documented in .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/EVAL-RESULTS.md under 'How to run (GATED)'. Defer is a valid choice; the phase build stands complete either way.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to run the metered claude -p eval measurements (EVL-01 forward + reciprocal, EVL-02 behavior) or defer them.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 20 built + deterministically verified the eval infrastructure build-then-halt; the empirical numbers close EVL-01/EVL-02. A usage limit was hit once this session, so a fresh session may be safer for the heavy EVL-02 run.

decisions.decision: Ran the 3 executors sequentially on the main tree, no worktree isolation.
decisions.rationale: Branch is 150 commits ahead of origin/main with worktree.baseRef unset, so worktree agents fork from origin/main - which lacks the build-target dir (lz-red-workspace) and the lz-red skill. GSD's shouldDegrade said false (false negative). Verified via git ls-tree origin/main.

decisions.decision: Kept EVL-01/EVL-02 at Pending in REQUIREMENTS.md despite phase.complete flipping them to Complete.
decisions.rationale: They are empirical requirements not yet demonstrated (the run is gated). gsd-verifier independently confirmed Pending is the correct, non-deceptive state. VIT-02 is already Pending as precedent.

decisions.decision: Honored D-11 build-then-halt: nothing metered ran.
decisions.rationale: eval-run-approval-gate: never spend claude -p tokens without explicit user approval.

next_action: Resume the gated-eval decision conversation. The user asked to CLARIFY the run/defer options before answering - answer their clarifying questions (cost/time per option, what Pending blocks, what the runs reveal, session headroom, mechanics), then re-present the decision. Do NOT run any metered eval (no claude -p / run_eval / subagent fan-out) until the user explicitly approves.
context_notes: Phase 20 was executed via /gsd-core:gsd-execute-phase 20. Everything build-side is done, committed, and hygiene-clean (ASCII + email-allowlist). The whole phase was designed build-then-halt (D-11). The final orchestrator obligation (per 20-03 output) is to present EVAL-RESULTS.md's 'How to run (GATED)' set and await approval - which I did, then the user paused after choosing to clarify the options first. If the user later approves, the EVL-02 fan-out is ORCHESTRATOR-driven (the gsd-executor cannot spawn subagents): spawn UNNAMED fire-and-forget subagents per scenario x config x run in isolated scratch cwds, WAIT for ALL completion notifications before grading (timing is only available at completion), then grade -> judge -> merge -> verify -> aggregate, then Pass@k/Pass^k + >=1 unbiased-from-scratch reviewer. Watch the naive-email-regex false-positive on lz-tdd@X.Y.Z version/archive tokens when running hygiene scans. A reusable ASCII+allowlist hygiene scan is at the session scratchpad (hygiene-scan-p20.mjs) and the learnings-bridge transform at learnings-bridge-p20.mjs - both throwaway.
